name: sap-bdc
description: SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) plugin for Claude: 7 human-facing skills (onboarding, core admin, governance/catalog, connect/sharing, intelligent apps, SAP Databricks, SAP-Note troubleshooter) paired with a machine-facing MCP server that exposes 14 tools for Delta Sharing, CSN schema management, provisioning, validation, and diagnostics. Curated against 22 SAP Notes.
